creator: meetshamsher@gmail.com
text:
Hi,
1. As dpdk is working in data plane, is there way to set IP for layer 3 to transfer packets like KNI/tap etc in Linux side

OR 

2. Is there any tool to test and compare traffic with and without dpdk stack.
Something like netperf, iperf/iperf3 which FreeBSD support but it need ip settings.
--
shamsher
